description: Site navigation breadcrumb trail rendered as an ordered list showing the current page's position in the hierarchy, with the last item marked as the current page.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Three-level breadcrumb trail ending on a current page with no link

items.label: Travelling to Sheffield from the airport

stories.name: FiveLevels
stories.description: Deep five-level breadcrumb trail for deeply nested content

items.label: An MBA's journey to industry 4.0: Key takeaways from Germany's tech leaders

stories.name: CoursePageFourLevels
stories.description: Four-level breadcrumb as seen on undergraduate course pages

notes: The last item in the list always has class 'current' and is rendered as plain text (no anchor). All preceding items are rendered as anchor links. Context-specific CSS rules exist for different page types — these are styling variants controlled by body classes, not by the component itself.
htmlExamples:
• Home
  • New students
  • Travelling to Sheffield from the airport

• Home
  • Management School
  • The Sheffield MBA
  • Student and alumni insight
  • MBA blog archive
  • An MBA's journey to industry 4.0
